title: Cobblemon Loot Buffs
description: Sometimes the loot in Cobblemon can feel a bit... underwhelming. Not anymore!
body:
## This Addon will NO LONGER be receiving updates

Is it just me, or does loot in Cobblemon always feel ever-so-slightly underwhelming? I aimed to fix that with this addon. This addon edits the Cobblemon loot tables to add some more loot where I thought it fit best. Some examples of what has been changed are:

- Shipwreck Coves *(All odds/amounts increased if challenged with Trial Omen)*
> - Added a chance for EXP Candies in the central trial spawner 
> - **Added a small chance for Ability Capsules & Patches from the central trial spawner**
> - Added Dive & Net Balls to the secondary trial spawners
> - Added Ultra Balls to the vanilla chests
- PokéRod Fishing
> - Higher overall chance for PokéRod Treasure, lower overall chance for PokéRod Junk & Fishing Treasure
- Village PokéCenter
> - Added Common Poké Balls to the PokéCenter chests
- Ruins
> - Added Ancient Poké Balls & Great Balls to the gilded chests & to the pots
> - Added Relic Coin Pouches to every uncommon archaeology loot table
- Vanilla Structures
> - Added Type Gems to Ancient City chests
> - Added a small chance for Malicious Armor in Bastions & for Auspicious Armor in Fortresses
> - Added Never-Melt Ice to Igloo chests
> - Added Dive & Net Balls to Shipwreck chests

Explore your Cobblemon world, and maybe even come across Ability Capsules and Ability Patches! How exciting!

**To Install a Datapack:**
- **During world creation, click `More`, then `Data Packs`. Drop the datapack directly in the menu that pops up, or press `Open Pack Folder` and place it there.**
> - ***OR***
- **For an existing world, go into the World Selection Screen, click on your world of choice, then click `Edit` -> `Open World Folder`, then navigate to the datapacks folder, and place the datapack there.**
